calendar.matters:
MOTION Relief
Off Calendar Mar-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Ralph Scott, (no tel. #) pltf & moving party in pro per; Jessica A. Petrini, Esq. 362-2580 for deft & opposing party British Motor Car Distributors, Ltd.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Pltf to prepare order.

Motion For Reconsideration Per 1008
Off Calendar Feb-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Ralph Scott, (no tel. #) pltf & moving party in pro per; Jessica A. Petrini, Esq. 438-6623 for deft & opposing party British Motor Car Distributors, Ltd.
RULING: Argued and the Court denies the motion for reconsideration and cannot treat as 473. Order signed in open court.

Motion For Reconsideration Per 1008
Off Calendar Feb-19-2002 Continued To Feb-21-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: CONTINUED TO 2-21-02 PER MOVING PARTY.

Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Dec-18-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Ralph Scott, (no tel. #), pltf & opposing party in pro per; Jessica A. Petrini, Esq. 438-6623 for deft & moving party British Motor Car Distributors, Ltd.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion. Order signed in open court.

Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Dec-06-2001 Continued To Dec-18-01 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Ralph Scott, (no tel. #) pltf & opposing party; Jessica A. Petrini, Esq. 438-6623 for deft & moving party British Motor Car Distributors, Ltd.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 12/18/01.
